what_it_tests: Batch, worker, and prefetch plateau on one GPU.
Worker count selection across eight replicated ranks.
Two- and four-node parameter selection before scale probing.
Per-node throughput and rank balance through sixteen nodes.
DALI versus tuned CPU at ordinary ImageNet shape.
DALI batch, thread, and queue-depth tuning for large JPEG input.
Where the tuned backend choice changes by input size.
Throughput ceiling after moving decode or preprocessing offline.
Derived pre-resized JPEG representation evidence; explains why DALI can win on derived 224 while CPU still wins canonical ImageNet.
